title: MacUtils
body:
# MacUtils 1.6.0
![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/macutils) ![Static Badge](ttps://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft_Version-26.1.2-blue)

## Features
### Commands
- `/lockpitch <pitch>` sets the pitch lock to the specified value
- `/lockyaw <yaw>` sets the yaw lock to the specified value
- `/customcommand <number>` runs the custom command specifies by the number ***Set custom commands in config***
- `/admessage` sends an ad message for macbox.minehut.gg ***Only use in MineHut lobby***
### KeyBinds
- `/ec`
- `/trash`
- Open Config Screen
- Custom Commands 1-5 ***Customisable in config screen***
- Lock / Unlock Pitch
- Lock / Unlock Yaw
### Changes
- All toggles are now in the config screen!
- Everything persists between restarts so no more running /autofeed when you join
### Translations
- English
- Hungarian (Magyar)
- German
### Credits
- IGN/Discord
- Mocsek/mocsek - Hungarian (Magyar) Translation
- Vyrefv/vyrefv. - German Translation
### Translators wanted!
If you want to translate the mod into another language please message me on discord (potatoslayer56) and I will show you how.
